findings.description: Ensure table headers have discernible text
findings.evidence:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have text that is visible to screen readers [<th scope="col"></th>]

findings.description: Title slide content is duplicated: the heading 'Introduction to Flow Scenarios' appears as HTML text AND the entire title slide is embedded as a screenshot image below it, creating redundant reading of the same content.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has one title slide. HTML page 1 shows a text heading 'Introduction to Flow Scenarios' at top, then the full title slide rendered as an embedded image below it with all the same text.

findings.description: The 'Flow Regime Tied to Ecology' flowchart diagram is missing. The PDF shows a structured visual flowchart with boxes and arrows linking 'Sound Ecological Environment' to four flow types and their sub-functions. The HTML replaces this with a nested bulleted text list, losing the visual diagram entirely.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 contains a flowchart graphic with boxes for 'Sound Ecological Environment', 'Subsistence Flows', 'Base Flows', 'High Flow Pulses', 'Overbank Flows' connected by arrows with subordinate detail boxes. HTML renders only a nested text hierarchy with no image of the diagram.

findings.description: Cheoah River base flow table appears twice: once as the embedded slide image and once as an HTML table, creating duplicated reading of the same data.
findings.evidence: PDF page 8 shows the Cheoah River monthly base flow table once in a slide. HTML shows the slide screenshot image containing the table AND a separate HTML table reproducing the same 'Monthly Base Flow (cfs) Releases from Santeetlah Dam' data directly below it.

findings.description: Cheoah River high flow events table (Table 2) appears twice: once as the embedded slide image and once as an HTML table, creating duplicated reading of the same data.
findings.evidence: PDF page 9 shows Table 2 (High Flow Events – 5-year Repeating Schedule) once in a slide. HTML shows the slide screenshot image containing the table AND a separate HTML table reproducing the same data with footnotes below it.

findings.description: Cheoah River monthly base flow table (PDF page 8) is rendered both as an embedded slide image AND as a separate HTML <table>. The same data appears twice.
findings.evidence: HTML section 'Example – Cheoah River' contains immediately followed by a with caption 'Monthly Base Flow (cfs) Releases from Santeetlah Dam into the Cheoah River Bypassed Reach.' containing identical Tier A/Tier B data.

findings.description: Cheoah River high flow events table (PDF page 9) is rendered both as an embedded slide image AND as a separate HTML <table>. The same data appears twice.
findings.evidence: HTML second 'Example – Cheoah River' section contains immediately followed by a with caption 'Table 2. High Flow Events – 5-year Repeating Schedule.' containing identical data.

findings.description: Two Cheoah River slide images have empty alt text (alt="") despite containing meaningful visual content (table layouts, formatting context from the original slides).
findings.evidence: HTML: and — both for Cheoah River slides that show formatted tables.
